case_title: MICHAEL AUSTIN VS. ANTHONY CASTILLO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,202.65 FILED BY AUSTIN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ANTHONY CASTILLO, CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $59.00) SERVED DEC-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, CHRISTINE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF FILED BY AUSTIN, MICHAEL CASTILLO, ANTHONY CASTILLO, CHRISTINE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, MICHAEL ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ANTHONY CASTILLO, CHRISTINE $1,202.65 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,291.65, DEFENDANT ANTHONY CASTILLO WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF RE HIS REQUEST TO AMEND THE TERMS OF THE LEASE TO PROVIDE FOR THE PAYMENT OF A LATE CHARGE AND A NSF FEE. COURT IS WITHOUT JURISDICTION TO DETERMINE PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR AN ORDER DIRECTING DEFENDANTS TO TEMPORARILY VACATE THE PREMISES TO ALLOW HIM TO MAKE FLOOR REPAIRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2011 BY JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT'S WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ANTHONY CASTILLO, CHRISTINE
